Dyson Sphere Program Factory Planner

offline · no network
Feedback

About this tool

This is an unofficial, fan-made production planner for Dyson Sphere Program. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Youthcat Studio or Gamera Games.

Game data is pinned to Dyson Sphere Program version 0.10.29.21950 and may drift from the live game after future updates.

Known limitations

  • Displayed power is work power only — idle drain (roughly 1–4% per machine) is not modeled.
  • Fractionator-based deuterium production is treated as a raw import rather than a modeled machine step; its real rate depends on belt speed and loop layout, which this tool doesn't simulate.
  • Gas giant and ice giant orbital harvesting is intentionally excluded from all recipes.

How to use

Click items in the target grid to add production goals and set a rate in items/min. Adjust machine tiers, alternate recipes, and proliferator settings to match your factory — results recompute live. The current plan is saved in the page URL, so copying the share link sends your whole setup to anyone you paste it to.

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Open an issue on GitHub.
